# Session Intelligence Telemetry

Session intelligence quality signal telemetry closes the feedback loop between what gets injected and whether it helped. Capturing session intelligence telemetry at the point of use — when an agent acts on injected context — is more valuable than logging at injection time alone. Aggregating session intelligence telemetry by artifact source over time reveals which knowledge stores reliably produce high-utility context and which degrade ranking quality.
